meaning: adj.中国的,中国人的,中国话的,汉语的n.中国人,中国话,汉语,中文
examples: The spinning wheel was a Chinese invention.
Many Japanese and Chinese teas are green teas.
The chef, staff, and managers are all Chinese.
Barclays , for instance, now believes the Chinese economy will grow 7.8% this year.
Cisco did not customize or train the Chinese in how to use the routers.
